sector_a.objective: Open any unlocked Gate #A. Ground Floor: (D-4), (F-2), (H-2)
sector_a.reward: 100 Gallimaufry G, Ra'Kaznar Key A G

sector_a.objective: Cast magic next to Diaphanous Device #A. Any magic works, including summoning an alter-ego / trust.
sector_a.reward: 100 Gallimaufry G, Ra'Kaznar Plate A G

sector_a.objective: Vanquish 3 Abject foes using single-target magic for the killing blow.
sector_a.reward: 100 Gallimaufry G, Ra'Kaznar Shard A G

sector_a.objective: Vanquish 3 more Abject foes using single-target magic for the killing blow.
sector_a.reward: 100 Gallimaufry G, Ra'Kaznar Metal A G

sector_a.objective: Interact with Diaphanous Bitzer #A while naked.
sector_a.reward: 100 Gallimaufry G, Ra'Kaznar Sheet A G

sector_a.objective: Vanquish 5 Abject foes. (Does NOT include Abject Obdella)
/heal in the area between Gate #A1 and the Abject Leeches.

sector_b.reward: 100 Gallimaufry G, Ra'Kaznar Key B G
100 Gallimaufry G, Ra'Kaznar Plate B G

sector_b.objective: Perform a Weapon Skill on 5 Biune foes before defeating them.
sector_b.reward: 100 Gallimaufry G, Ra'Kaznar Shard B G

sector_b.objective: Perform a Weapon Skill on 5 more Biune foes before defeating them.
sector_b.reward: 100 Gallimaufry G, Ra'Kaznar Metal B G

sector_b.objective: Interact with Diaphanous Bitzer #B after traveling from the entrance on foot. If you use a Diaphanous Device to warp you must warp back to the start and start over.
sector_b.reward: 100 Gallimaufry G, Ra'Kaznar Sheet B G

sector_b.objective: Vanquish 3 Biune foes within 30 seconds of gaining enmity.
Open any Locked Gate #B. Ground Floor: (J-8), (K-8), (M-8)
Vanquish Biune Porxie after meeting the objective for Casket #B1.

sector_c.objective: Open Gate #C1 or #C2 before defeating any enemies in Sector C.
sector_c.reward: 100 Gallimaufry G, Ra'Kaznar Key C G

sector_c.objective: Pull a Cachaemic foe to Diaphanous Device #C and defeat it there.
sector_c.reward: 100 Gallimaufry G, Ra'Kaznar Plate C G

sector_c.objective: Perform a Magic Burst on 3 Cachaemic foes before defeating them.
sector_c.reward: 100 Gallimaufry G, Ra'Kaznar Shard C G

sector_c.objective: Perform a Magic Burst on 3 more Cachaemic foes before defeating them.
sector_c.reward: 100 Gallimaufry G, Ra'Kaznar Metal C G

sector_c.objective: Vanquish at least one Cachaemic foe, Materialize Cachaemic foes at Diaphanous Device #C, then interact with Diaphanous Bitzer #C. The same player who Materializes must interact with the Bitzer.
sector_c.reward: 100 Gallimaufry G, Ra'Kaznar Sheet C G

sector_c.objective: Vanquish 3 Cachaemic foes within 15 seconds of gaining enmity.
Vanquish Cachaemic Bhoot within 5 minutes of its spawn. Timer begins upon entering Sector C. Bhoot must be defeated before rematerializing to reset the timer.

sector_d.objective: Open Gates #D1 and #D2, in either order, within two minutes of each other.
sector_d.reward: 100 Gallimaufry G, Ra'Kaznar Key D G

sector_d.objective: Drop your Obsid. Wing at Diaphanous Device #D. You will not be kicked out for doing this, and you will get a new one immediately.
sector_d.reward: 100 Gallimaufry G, Ra'Kaznar Plate D G

sector_d.objective: Perform a 4-step Skillchain on 3 Demisang foes before defeating them. (It will not count if they die from the skillchain even if the Skillchain damage appears in chat.)
sector_d.reward: 100 Gallimaufry G, Ra'Kaznar Shard D G

sector_d.objective: Perform a 4-step Skillchain on 3 more Demisang foes before defeating them. (It will not count if they die from the skillchain even if the Skillchain damage appears in chat.)
sector_d.reward: 100 Gallimaufry G, Ra'Kaznar Metal D G

sector_d.objective: Vanquish all Demisang foes, then interact with Diaphanous Bitzer #D. Demisang Deleterious not required.
sector_d.reward: 100 Gallimaufry G, Ra'Kaznar Sheet D G

sector_d.objective: Vanquish 6 Demisang foes of different jobs.
Vanquish Demisang foes in standard job order: WAR, MNK, WHM, BLM, RDM, THF. Defeating Demisang Deleterious does not interrupt the order.
Vanquish Demisang Deleterious, then any 3 Demisang foes.

other.objective: Vanquish Abject Obdella, Biune Porxie, Cachaemic Bhoot, and Demisang Deleterious. Any rematerialized copies must also be defeated.

sector_e.objective: Vanquish Esurient Botulus with a majority of damage coming from Weapon Skills performed from behind it. Skillchain damage does not count toward the requirement.
sector_e.reward: 100 Gallimaufry G, Ra'Kaznar Metal E G

sector_e.objective: Vanquish 12 Esurient foes in the room containing the Bitzer.

Vanquish the 6 mini-Naakuals which appear 5 minutes after entering Sector E. Timer resets if the sector is evacuated before spawn, including the situation where all players enter the boss arena. Basement: (F/G-6)

sector_f.objective: Vanquish Fetid Ixion while the horn is broken. Conditions on what breaks the horn are still being tested.
sector_f.reward: 100 Gallimaufry G, Ra'Kaznar Metal F G

sector_f.objective: Interact with the Diaphanous Bitzer while visibly wearing or lockstyling 5/5 pieces of Empyrean Armor of any upgrade level (including the base piece) for your current job. (Note: Bitzer not always in same location.)
Vanquish the 6 mini-Naakuals which appear when any party member who has previously left Sector F re-enters it. Basement: (J-6)

sector_g.reward: 100 Gallimaufry G, Ra'Kaznar Metal G G

sector_g.objective: Stand still within 6 yalms of the Diaphanous Bitzer while continuously targeting it for 30 seconds. (Note: Bitzer not always in same location.)

Vanquish the 6 mini-Naakuals which appear after defeating all enemies in both sides of the split room. Naakuals automatically rematerialize without opening the door or spawning the coffer if not defeated in a specific order: Bztavian -> Rockfin -> Gabbrath -> Waktza -> Yggdreant -> Cehuetzi. Basement: (J-10)

sector_h.objective: Vanquish Haughty Tulittia after doing X-Amount of Indirect Damage through the form of AoE's targeted on another monster. (approx. 50%) Potentially could be Vanquish Haughty Tulittia after doing so many WS's (Number of WS's needed = Unknown)
sector_h.reward: 100 Gallimaufry G, Ra'Kaznar Metal H G

sector_h.objective: Killing all Haughty Paladin will spawn the chest, other jobs do not spawn the chest.

Vanquish the 6 mini-Naakuals which appear after defeating 8 Haughty foes of different jobs. Naakuals automatically rematerialize without opening the door or spawning the coffer if not defeated in alphabetic order: Bztavian -> Cehuetzi -> Gabbrath -> Rockfin -> Waktza -> Yggdreant. Basement: (F-10)

other.objective: Vanquish Esurient Botulus, Fetid Ixion, Gyvewrapped Naraka and Haughty Tulittia, then interact with Diaphanous Gadget #? west of the room containing 12 Esurient Flan in Sector E. The person who touches the Gadget must be in possession of all 4 Ra'Kaznar Fragments.

Vanquish all of the following: 3 each of Esurient Slime, Slug, and Flan; 2 each of Fetid Baelfyr, Gefyrst, Ungeweder, Byrgen, and Veela; 3 each of Gyvewrapped Hound, Dullahan, and Vampyr; 8 Haughty foes of different jobs.
